scripts.predev: node scripts/patch-lesson-progress.mjs && node scripts/patch-schedule-order.mjs && node scripts/patch-dat-progress.mjs && node scripts/patch-dat-ledger.mjs && node scripts/patch-student-tuition-defaults.mjs && node scripts/patch-premium-input-controls.mjs && node scripts/patch-ocr-card-route.mjs && node scripts/patch-ocr-dob-normalize.mjs && node scripts/patch-vietnam-date-format.mjs
scripts.prebuild: node scripts/patch-lesson-progress.mjs && node scripts/patch-schedule-order.mjs && node scripts/patch-dat-progress.mjs && node scripts/patch-dat-ledger.mjs && node scripts/patch-student-tuition-defaults.mjs && node scripts/patch-premium-input-controls.mjs && node scripts/patch-ocr-card-route.mjs && node scripts/patch-ocr-dob-normalize.mjs && node scripts/patch-vietnam-date-format.mjs
scripts.clean: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); ['dist', 'server.js'].forEach(p => { if (fs.existsSync(p)) fs.rmSync(p, { recursive: true, force: true }) })"
scripts.verify: npm run verify:static && npm run verify:security
